commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a typed `session.operation` Gateway event for manual compaction, emits compact start/end during `sessions.compact`, routes it into the WebChat compaction indicator, updates protocol docs/schema, and adds regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main's `/compact` path awaits backend compaction without emitting the events that drive the existing Control UI compaction indicator. I did not run a live browser flow in this read-only sweep.
